# render-detail

Per-plugin commands section in the plugin detail pane. Contributes a
`PluginView.Section` that reads `node.facets["commands"]` and lists each
`defineCommand` with its `Group.Member` name and the underlying command id.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Per-plugin commands section in the plugin detail pane.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginViewSlots.Section` "commands" → `CommandsDetailSection`
